leadText: The Ribbon Sweet (Japanese: リボンアメざいく Ribbon Amezaiku) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VIII. It is one of the sweets that can be used to evolve Milcery.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Milcery to evolve into Alcremie with a Ribbon Sweet when the player does a spin while Milcery is holding it. This consumes the Ribbon Sweet.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A ribbon-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.
